description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and matching tights. Product Details Pink printed shirt made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, curved stitching on the waist and inverted pleats at the back Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height
